testcase.name: test_owner_login

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing token or user in response assert ('access_token' in {'email': 'owner@grillshack.nz', 'id': 'da449cfe-6b6f-4268-a76c-a89642b8566d', 'name': 'Owner', 'role': 'owner', ...} or 'user' in {'email': 'owner@grillshack.nz', 'id': 'da449cfe-6b6f-4268-a76c-a89642b8566d', 'name': 'Owner', 'role': 'owner', ...})

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_market_mode_enhancements.py:32: in test_owner_login assert "access_token" in data or "user" in data, "Missing token or user in response" E AssertionError: Missing token or user in response E assert ('access_token' in {'email': 'owner@grillshack.nz', 'id': 'da449cfe-6b6f-4268-a76c-a89642b8566d', 'name': 'Owner', 'role': 'owner', ...} or 'user' in {'email': 'owner@grillshack.nz', 'id': 'da449cfe-6b6f-4268-a76c-a89642b8566d', 'name': 'Owner', 'role': 'owner', ...})
